aiAutomation.title: AI Automation for Business
aiAutomation.subtitle: Streamline operations and boost efficiency with custom AI solutions.
aiAutomation.description: We design and implement AI automation systems that transform how your business operates — from customer service to internal workflows.

aiChatbot.title: AI Chatbot Development
aiChatbot.subtitle: Intelligent chatbots that engage customers 24/7.
aiChatbot.description: Custom AI chatbots built with the latest LLM technology to handle customer inquiries, generate leads, and provide instant support.

aiAssistant.title: AI Business Assistant
aiAssistant.subtitle: Your AI-powered business companion.
aiAssistant.description: AI assistants tailored to your business processes — from data analysis to automated reporting and decision support.

aiSupport.title: AI Customer Support
aiSupport.subtitle: Automated customer support that feels human.
aiSupport.description: AI-powered support systems that resolve customer issues instantly, reduce wait times and improve satisfaction scores.

smm.title: Social Media Marketing
smm.subtitle: Build your brand and engage your audience on social media.
smm.description: Strategic social media management across all platforms — content creation, community management, paid campaigns and analytics.

seo.title: SEO Optimization
seo.subtitle: Rank higher, get more organic traffic.
seo.description: Comprehensive SEO services including technical SEO, on-page optimization, link building and content strategy for sustainable growth.

googleAds.title: Google Ads Management
googleAds.subtitle: Maximize your ROI with expert PPC management.
googleAds.description: Data-driven Google Ads campaigns that deliver qualified leads and measurable returns on your advertising investment.

contentMarketing.title: Content Marketing
contentMarketing.subtitle: Content that educates, engages and converts.
contentMarketing.description: Strategic content creation and distribution — blog posts, whitepapers, videos and more to establish thought leadership and drive traffic.

marketingStrategy.title: Marketing Strategy
marketingStrategy.subtitle: A comprehensive roadmap for your marketing success.
marketingStrategy.description: Data-driven marketing strategies tailored to your business goals, target audience and competitive landscape.

websiteDev.title: Website Development
websiteDev.subtitle: Modern, fast and SEO-optimized websites.
websiteDev.description: Custom website development with a focus on performance, user experience and search engine optimization.

webAppDev.title: Web Application Development
webAppDev.subtitle: Powerful web applications for your business.
webAppDev.description: Full-stack web application development using modern frameworks and cloud infrastructure for scalable, reliable solutions.

mobileAppDev.title: Mobile App Development
mobileAppDev.subtitle: Native and cross-platform mobile applications.
mobileAppDev.description: iOS and Android app development — from concept to launch, with focus on performance and user experience.

saasDev.title: SaaS Development
saasDev.subtitle: Build your SaaS product from idea to scale.
saasDev.description: End-to-end SaaS development — architecture, development, deployment and scaling for subscription-based software products.

startupMvp.title: Startup MVP Development
startupMvp.subtitle: Launch your startup faster with a validated MVP.
startupMvp.description: Rapid MVP development to validate your business idea, attract investors and get to market quickly.

appStorePublishing.title: App Store Publishing
appStorePublishing.subtitle: Get your app live on the Apple App Store.
appStorePublishing.description: Complete App Store publishing service — from app review preparation to ASO optimization and successful approval.

googlePlayPublishing.title: Google Play Publishing
googlePlayPublishing.subtitle: Launch your app on Google Play.
googlePlayPublishing.description: End-to-end Google Play publishing — store listing optimization, compliance review and launch support.

appLaunchMarketing.title: App Launch Marketing
appLaunchMarketing.subtitle: Make your app launch a success.
appLaunchMarketing.description: Comprehensive app launch strategy — pre-launch buzz, launch day execution and post-launch growth marketing.
